subcodes.first_line: This is that which hath dawned from the horizon of the All-Merciful's utterance - exalted be His utterance: O thou who art raised high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینست آنچه از مشرق بیان رحمانی اشراق فرمود بیانه عز بیانه ای رفیع اقرار بر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @mindfulness; concentration; focus
